title: Arduino
focus: Embedded programming foundations, microcontroller I/O, sensor integration, and prototyping practice.
achievement: Applied the core Arduino workflow directly in multiple hardware prototypes including MediTracker.

title: C-BVA
focus: Boundary value analysis and structured software test design techniques.

title: Embedded
focus: Embedded architecture, firmware flow, hardware-software interfacing, and real-time constraints.

title: Project Management
focus: Planning, execution control, risk tracking, and delivery governance.
achievement: Applied project structuring methods to keep engineering builds predictable and milestone-driven.

title: SolidWorks
